turns.content: Do not rewrite core architecture. Preserve the auth/session boundary, keep command handling bounded, and require tests for behavior changes.
This is a longer evaluation session. Keep changes incremental, preserve architecture, and avoid broad refactors.
I will keep the session architecture-safe and incremental.
